## Summary

Describe the feature you want.

## Problem to solve

What limitation, friction, or missing capability does this address?

## Proposed solution

Describe the ideal behavior.

## Example workflow

Explain how this feature would be used in practice.

## Alternatives considered

List any workarounds or alternate approaches you considered.

## Additional context

Any extra design notes, screenshots, or examples.
